scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix functions && npm install --prefix hosting && npm install --prefix emulator-ui && npm install --prefix scripts
scripts.audit: npm audit && npm audit --prefix functions && npm audit --prefix hosting && npm audit --prefix emulator-ui && npm audit --prefix scripts
scripts.audit:fix: npm audit fix && npm audit fix --prefix functions && npm audit fix --prefix hosting && npm audit fix --prefix emulator-ui && npm audit fix --prefix scripts
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run emulators" "npm run hosting:dev" "npm run viewer:dev"
scripts.deploy: npm run hosting:build && firebase deploy --only firestore,functions,hosting
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run hosting:build && firebase deploy --only hosting
